overview: Adarsh College of Engineering (ACEE) was established in 2008 in Chebrolu Village, Gollaprolu Mandal near Kakinada, East Godavari District (now Kakinada District), Andhra Pradesh. Founded by the Adarsh Educational Institutions group, the college works to impart quality technical education to engineering aspirants in the coastal districts of Andhra Pradesh. The college emphasizes core technical proficiencies along with supplementary vocational tracks.
accreditation: Approved by the All India Council for Technical Education (AICTE), New Delhi, and affiliated with Jawaharlal Nehru Technological University, Kakinada (JNTUK). The college also mentions NAAC evaluation and compliance parameters.

nirfRanking.engineering: Not Ranked in Top NIRF Lists

coursesAndFees.program: B.Tech (Computer Science, Electronics & Communication, Electrical & Electronics, Civil, Mechanical, Power Engineering)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹40,000 – ₹70,000 per year (Category A Convener Quota approx. ₹1.6 Lakhs total program tuition)

coursesAndFees.program: M.Tech (Computer Science & Engineering, Power Engineering Specializations)
coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹43,000 – ₹50,000 per year (Total course approx. ₹86,000 - ₹1,000,000 depending on stream updates)

coursesAndFees.program: After 10th Polytechnic Diploma (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, CSE)

placements.avgSalary: 自由 Entry level benchmarks hover between ₹1.90 LPA – ₹5.10 LPA
placements.medianSalary: ₹3.20 LPA – ₹3.50 LPA based on core branch tracking
placements.highestDomestic: ₹6.50 LPA – ₹18.00 LPA overall verified package boundaries
placements.placementRate: Up to 85% reported overall placements for specialized computer and electronics batches
placements.totalOffers: 1,000+ students collectively placed across active multi-year recruitment windows
placements.companiesVisited: 50+ recruiters active across general off-campus and pool-drive recruitment models

admissions.admissionProcess: Category A (70% standard convenience pool) state engineering seats are formally allocated via the AP EAPCET counseling window monitored by APSCHE. Remaining Category B institutional management quota mandates are allocated independently on merit validation.
admissions.importantDates: Counseling schedules run iteratively every cycle between June and October.

campus.area: Spacious rural educational footprint situated on the national highway grid
facilities: Core Mechanical, Civil, and Power Labs
Dedicated College Bus Fleet (connecting Kakinada and adjacent mandals)
campus.specialNote: The institute is strategically situated directly on NH-216 in Gollaprolu Mandal near Kakinada, ensuring seamless transport logistics for day scholars via state and local college networks.

hostelAndScholarships.hostelFee: ₹40,000 – ₹45,000 per year based on boarding variations
hostelAndScholarships.messFee: Factored locally via in-house canteen management standard packages
scholarships: Jagananna Vidya Deevena (JVD) structural full fee reimbursements for qualified AP natives
Post-Matric Welfare allowances from the Government of AP
Institutional fee cuts for verified academic toppers

contact.address: Adarsh Educational Institutions, NH-216, Gollaprolu, Near Kakinada, Chebrolu Village - 533449, Kakinada District, Andhra Pradesh, India
